fields.bio:
Tony Pro has spent his career using the power of design, art, and visualization to create connections between clients and their audiences.

As an Art Director and Designer in Hollywood, he worked on projects ranging from brand/identity development to creative video content development and fully integrated campaigns that span print, digital and A/V realms for all the major motion picture studios including MGM, Sony Pictures, Warner Brothers, Lionsgate, Universal Studios and many more.

He enjoys the process of solving communication challenges, visually and experientially. He has worked with clients spanning many industries from consumer goods and services, healthcare, and entertainment including Proctor & Gamble, Meadwestvaco, Best Buy, Blockbuster Video, and Kaiser Permanente.

He has worked with a number of different Los Angeles agencies at a senior level before relocating to San Antonio.

Tony is also an award-winning, internationally recognized, fine artist showing in many galleries around the country including Insight Gallery in Fredericksburg.

Tony graduated from California State University, Northridge with a BFA in Graphic Design.
